text: As used in ss. 322.44 and 322.50 , with reference to this state, the term “executive head” means the Governor.
markdown:
### Chapter 322. Driver Licenses
##### § 322.47 — Executive head defined

As used in ss. 322.44 and 322.50 , with reference to this state, the term “executive head” means the Governor.

subsections.text: As used in ss. 322.44 and 322.50 , with reference to this state, the term “executive head” means the Governor.
